title: 3/2 Profile (Martyr/Hermit)
content:
3/2 Profile (Martyr/Hermit)
BRKN/HIDEBreak systems to test truth → retreat to recharge → emerge with pattern
Incarnation Cross of Tension
X-TENCarry and transmute friction → system mutation through crisis
Working ID: MG32_W4V_X-TEN_BRKN.HIDE🧰 CREATIVE SYSTEM MODULES
1. 🌀 Prompt Shells (for AI)
🔹 MG32-RESPOND
🔹 X-TEN-FRICTION
🔹 W4V-WATCH
🔹 BRKN-RECODE
🔹 HIDE-CAST
2. 🛕 Ritual Blocks
Block
Ritual Name
Purpose
AM 1
Hermit ChamberBegin in silence. Set no goals. Let ideas come find you.
AM 2
Response RitualScroll, speak, move until something “clicks.” That’s your day’s code.
PM 1
Fracture WalkVisit something broken (object, system, file, song). Let it speak.
PM 2
Tension FireWrite the 3 biggest frictions. Burn or archive. Let one mutate.
PM 3
Neutral BellUse scent, sound, or light to signal: “I am in neutrality now.”
3. 🛠️ System Behaviors
System Logic
MG32_W4V_XTEN Behavior
Deadlines
